Bash(python3 scripts/generate-infographic.py --reference reference/infographic-ref-2.jpeg --output posts/004-full-fitout/image.png --prompt 'Light background real estate infographic comparing '\\''Bàn Giao Thô'\\'' vs '\\''Full Fit-Out'\\'' căn hộ đầu tư. Grid two-column layout. Left column header '\\''Bàn Giao Thô'\\'' with bullet costs: Sàn tường trần 80-120 triệu, Nội thất 150-250 triệu, Phòng ngủ 100-150 triệu, Điều hòa đèn 60-100 triệu. Total callout in red: '\\''390–620 TRIỆU'\\''. Right column header '\\''Full Fit-Out'\\'' with green checkmarks: 0 đồng hoàn thiện, Cho thuê ngay sau bàn giao, Nội thất đồng bộ cao cấp. Large bold comparison numbers as visual anchors. Footer: '\\''Bình Phan | IQI Đà Nẵng'\\''. CRITICAL: render Vietnamese diacritics exactly as provided.')

Bash(python3 scripts/generate-infographic.py --reference reference/infographic-ref-1.jpeg --output posts/006-ty-suat-cho-thue/image.png --prompt 'Light background real estate infographic showing rental yield comparison across 7 Vietnamese cities. Central donut chart with 7 colored segments. Large bold number '\\''8–12%'\\'' highlighted in center for Đà Nẵng. Right side ranking list: Đà Nẵng 8-12%, Hội An 7-10%, Đà Lạt 6-8%, Phú Quốc 5-8%, Nha Trang 5-7%, TP.HCM 4-6%, Hà Nội 3.5-5.5%. Bold callout box: '\\''Đà Nẵng #1 Tỷ Suất Cho Thuê'\\''. Flat design city building illustrations. Footer: '\\''Bình Phan | IQI Đà Nẵng'\\''. CRITICAL: render Vietnamese diacritics exactly as provided.')
